name: Mexican Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, combine the unsweetened chocolate and butter. Cook over low heat until melted.
2. Add sugar, light corn syrup, salt (if using), Kahlua, and cream to the chocolate mixture.
3. Stir constantly for 10 minutes or until all ingredients are well combined and the sauce is smooth.
4. Serve immediately over pound cake or ice cream.
5. To store, pour the sauce into a jar and seal tightly.
6. The sauce can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 3 months.
7. To warm the sauce before serving, place the jar in a pan of hot water set over low heat and stir until warmed through.
